rationale: Educ. Code §49.104 governs allocation of indebtedness in school district annexation agreements. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict exists.
quote: The annexation agreement may allocate to the receiving district any portion of the indebtedness of the district from which the territory is detached, and the receiving district assumes and is liable for the allocated indebtedness.
_note: Rule text concerns school district annexation debt allocation; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
